message:
test(bd-2m1a): cover docket cancellation, FIFO ordering, and edge cases

Add 8 new docket.rs tests covering: worker process_one with cancelled
cx, cancel with None reason, to_task_info for Failed status, cancel
nonexistent task, submit_with_options using default max_retries,
same-priority FIFO ordering, requeue_stale with invalid claimed_at
format, and DocketError::Cancelled into McpError conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
